timeline_funding.description: Through the application of national and local priorities, the CSJ program seeks to provide youth, particularly those who face barriers to employment with access to work opportunities. shared_directors.legal_name: CANADIAN RACE RELATIONS FOUNDATION - FONDATION CANADIENNE DES RELATIONS RACIALES

related_entities.name: United Way Greater Toronto
related_entities.reasoning: BN roots differ (119278216 vs 119278821), so these are distinct legal registrations. Names are nearly identical but different BN roots under CRA rules means DIFFERENT/RELATED legal entities — likely a rebranding or successor registration.

briefing_memo: United Way of Greater Toronto has received $167,183,331 in federal funding to date and holds CRA charitable designation 'A'. A former City of Toronto employee was charged with theft over $5,000 for allegedly stealing tens of thousands from United Way campaign funds while serving as financial coordinator (thestar.com), though this involves misappropriation by a municipal employee rather than organizational malfeasance. The organization has one T3010 filing violation and an overhead ratio of 15.51%, with all other adverse signals relating to the separate United Way of Chatham-Kent entity. Standard due-diligence procedures are recommended for future disbursements, noting that the identified theft involved a City of Toronto employee's alleged misappropriation rather than systemic organizational control failures.

actions.title: Review circular gifting patterns with recipient organizations
actions.rationale: Circular gifting score of 21/30 indicates moderate reciprocal funding relationships that warrant documentation review to ensure arm's-length transactions.

actions.title: Follow up on T3010 compliance issue
actions.rationale: One T3010 violation detected requires verification of corrective action and current filing compliance status.

actions.title: Continue standard monitoring procedures
actions.rationale: Overall risk score of 12 with no sanctions hits, court cases, or critical news indicates low adverse risk profile for an organization of this funding scale.
